task_completion.description: The required NOC dashboard tabs are open in the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for browser tabs open to Datadog (datadoghq.com/dashboard/system), PagerDuty (pagerduty.com/incidents), and AWS EC2 (console.aws.amazon.com/ec2).

task_completion.description: Bookmark folders are created and organized according to the standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the bookmarks bar or bookmark manager showing the specific folders: 'Alerting', 'Observability', 'Cloud Infrastructure', and 'Runbooks'.

task_completion.description: Non-work related junk domains are removed from the bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bookmarks bar or bookmark manager to ensure domains like Facebook, Netflix, Twitter, Reddit, Pinterest, Steam, Spotify, and TikTok are no longer present.

task_completion.description: Browser search engines and notification rules are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the browser's settings pages for 'Search engine' or 'Site settings' -> 'Notifications' being accessed and modified.

task_completion.description: Browser display settings and startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the browser's settings pages for 'Appearance' (display settings) and 'On startup' being accessed and modified.

task_completion.description: Browser performance settings or flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the browser's 'Performance' settings tab or the 'chrome://flags' page being accessed and toggled.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser's graphical user interface to make configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking through browser menus, settings pages, and bookmark managers rather than using terminal commands to directly edit browser SQLite databases or config files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the application being configured is an actual web browser (like Chrome or Chromium) and not a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent read the provided standard text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for ~/Desktop/noc_display_standard.txt being opened in a text editor (like gedit, nano, cat) to read the requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected live tabs to be open: datadoghq.com/dashboard/system, pagerduty.com/incidents, console.aws.amazon.com/ec2. Expected bookmark folders to be created: Alerting, Observability, Cloud Infrastructure, Runbooks. Junk domains that must be deleted from bookmarks: facebook.com, netflix.com, twitter.com, reddit.com, pinterest.com, steampowered.com, spotify.com, tiktok.com.
